title: [podman-5.8] github: run validation workflow also on release branches
body:
We call our release branches podman-x.y now so make sure we cover them as well.


(cherry picked from commit c028ad0b024ff1c822eb754a6ee34ba6e3a9595e)

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body:
cc @mtrmac @ashley-cui

I think we need to merge it on this branch as well for it to work here and not just going forward
